# Fixtures whose React Compiler diagnostics diverge from the OXC oracle.
# Generated by `UPDATE_SKIPLIST=1 cargo test --test corpus_sweep -- --ignored`.
# Each line is a fixture path relative to the corpus root. The sweep fails
# on any divergence not listed here (regression) or any listed fixture that
# now matches (stale — remove it). Shrinking this list is the goal.
